title: Silicon Valley Showdown (Debate Competition)
subtitle: To encourage critical thinking, technical awareness, and public speaking skills among students by engaging them in structured debates around innovation, technology, and industry-related themes.
description: BVP-OPTICA organized Silicon Valley Showdown, a debate competition designed to challenge participants to think like innovators and industry leaders. The event consisted of two rounds — a Technical Debate round followed by The CEO Courtroom, where participants defended their ideas and arguments in a simulated executive setting.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Round 1: Technical Debate on innovation and technology-driven topics
Round 2: CEO Courtroom – participants defended ideas as decision-makers
Participation:A total of 58 registrations were received through Unstop. Students participated in teams of 1–4 members, engaging in thoughtful discussions and competitive debate rounds.
